name: Penny Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup , undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in boiling salted water until tender; drain.
2. In a greased 2-1/2 qt baking dish, combine the cooked potatoes, hot dogs, onion, and peas.
3. Combine the soup, melted butter, prepared mustard, and pepper in a separate bowl.
4. Gently stir the soup mixture into the potato combination.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 25 minutes or until heated through.
6. Yield: 6-8 servings. () Any cream-based soup will work well.
